label: 恐惧迷宫生成
description: DFS完美迷宫算法，生成带恐惧房间、血脉墙体和晶体的黑暗恐怖迷宫。出生点、传送门、装饰物均以掩码形式写入网格。
description-en: DFS perfect maze generator with fear chambers, vein-textured walls, and blood crystals for horror dungeon scenes. Spawn, portal and decors are encoded as mask IDs in the grid.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。黑暗迷宫俯视图，红色细线迷宫通道蜿蜒其中，扩大的恐惧房间点缀其间，血红色晶体散布，主色2种。

inputs.name: width
inputs.label: 网格宽度
inputs.description: 网格列数，最小11，自动转为奇数
inputs.description-en: Grid column count, minimum 11; automatically forced to odd.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 网格高度
inputs.description: 网格行数，最小11，自动转为奇数
inputs.description-en: Grid row count, minimum 11; automatically forced to odd.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0使用当前时间戳

inputs.name: chamberChance
inputs.label: 恐惧房间概率
inputs.description: 路口扩展为恐惧房间的概率，0-1
inputs.description-en: Probability of widening maze intersections into fear chambers, 0-1.

inputs.name: veinChance
inputs.label: 血脉墙概率
inputs.description: 紧邻通道的墙格变为血脉格的概率，0-1
inputs.description-en: Probability of wall tiles adjacent to floor becoming vein tiles, 0-1.

inputs.name: crystalChance
inputs.label: 晶体生成概率
inputs.description: 恐惧房间内生成血晶的概率，0-1
inputs.description-en: Probability of generating blood crystals inside fear chambers, 0-1.

outputs.name: outputGrid
outputs.label: 输出网格
outputs.description: 恐惧迷宫网格：1=墙体,2=通道,3=血渍,4=恐惧房间,5=血晶,6=传送门,7=出生点,8=骷髅装饰,9=恐惧之眼（单点POI）
outputs.description-en: Fear labyrinth grid: 1=wall, 2=floor, 3=blood stain, 4=chamber, 5=crystal, 6=portal, 7=spawn, 8=skull decor, 9=fear eye (single POI).

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 各掩码ID与中文名称的映射列表（仅含网格中实际出现的ID）
outputs.description-en: Mask ID to Chinese name mapping list (only IDs that appear in the grid).
